name: RWJ_define_joinery
description: This component defines the joinery for roundwood elements with its surfaces and degrees of freedom.

inputParameters.name: i_curves_datatree
inputParameters.description: The datatree containing the joint faces. The root level is the whole beam joints, the first depth is the joint groups, the second depth is the joint, and the third and last depth is the joint faces.

inputParameters.name: i_dof_vectors
inputParameters.description: The degrees of freedom that each joint group has. The order of the DOF vectors should be the same as the order of the joint groups in the i_curves_datatree.

inputParameters.name: i_target_areas_datatree
inputParameters.description: The target areas for each joint face. The datatree structure should match the structure of the i_curves_datatree.

outputParameters.name: o_joinery
outputParameters.description: The defined joinery for a single beam.
